chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Fasting in sha’ban

text: 1825 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «صَوْمُ شَهْرِ شَعْبَانَ وَ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ شَهْرَيْنِ مُتَتَابِعَيْنِ تَوْبَةٌ وَ اَللَّهِ مِنَ اَللَّهِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1825 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Fasting the Month of Sha‘ban and Month of Ramadan consecutively is repentance, by Allah (swt), from Allah (swt)."
